sizing_rule.note: Full optimal f doubles account in 12 trades; half f (0.5×optimal_f) doubles in 16 trades. Choice between growth rate and volatility tolerance. Formula: Account_growth = (1 + f_fraction × optimal_f)^n

source_rule_text: Position sizing using full optimal f versus fractional f (half f) produces different growth rates and doubling times, with full f doubling in 12 trades while half f doubles in 16 trades
